user_notes: === EUFY ROBOVAC ACCESSORY INVESTIGATION TEMPLATE ===
🔍 INVESTIGATION MODE ACTIVE:
• All sensors start DISABLED for investigation
• Byte positions are UNKNOWN placeholders
• Use multi-key investigation files to discover correct positions
• Enable sensors only AFTER finding correct byte locations
📊 INVESTIGATION WORKFLOW:
1. Run integration with Investigation Mode enabled
2. Capture baseline before cleaning cycle
3. Run 5-10 minute cleaning cycle
4. Capture post-cleaning data
5. Analyze JSON files for byte changes in suspected ranges
6. Update byte_position when you find correct locations
7. Enable sensor and set realistic life percentage
🎯 FINDING CORRECT BYTE POSITIONS:
• Look for bytes that DECREASE by 1-3 after cleaning
• Focus on bytes in 1-100 range (percentage candidates)
• Check percentage_candidates arrays for each key
• Cross-reference with Eufy Android app percentages
✅ WHEN YOU FIND CORRECT POSITIONS:
• Update 'byte_position': [correct_number]
• Set 'enabled': true
• Update 'current_life_remaining': [real_percentage]
• Add findings to 'notes' field
• Remove 'investigation_target': true
🔧 CURRENT SENSOR ASSIGNMENTS:
• Rolling Brush: Key 152 - Check percentage candidates
• Side Brush: Key 153 - Check percentage candidates
• Dust Filter: Key 154 - Check percentage candidates
• Mop Cloth: Key 157 - Check percentage candidates
• Cliff Sensors: Key 158 - Check percentage candidates (may be status flags)
• Brush Guard: Key 161 - Check percentage candidates
• Cleaning Tray: Key 162 - Check percentage candidates
• Water Tank: Key 167 - Check percentage candidates
⚠️ IMPORTANT INVESTIGATION NOTES:
• NO MORE KEY 180 ASSUMPTIONS - All sensors redistributed
• Sensors start DISABLED to avoid false readings
• All life percentages are template values
• Enable sensors only after verifying correct byte positions
• Document your findings in the notes for each sensor
• This file will NEVER be auto-overwritten
🔬 BYTE ANALYSIS TIPS:
• Values of 255 (0xFF) are likely status flags, not percentages
• Look for logical decreases after cleaning cycles
• Percentage values should be in 1-100 range
• Compare multiple cleaning cycles to confirm patterns
📁 INVESTIGATION FILES LOCATION:
/config/eufy_investigation/DEVICE_ID/
• multi_key_baseline_TIMESTAMP.json
• multi_key_post_cleaning_TIMESTAMP.json
• multi_key_monitoring_TIMESTAMP.json
• enhanced_multi_key_session_summary_SESSION_ID.json
🎉 SUCCESS CRITERIA:
• Byte values match Eufy Android app percentages
• Values decrease logically after cleaning cycles
• Consistent readings across multiple test cycles
• No false 255 or 0 values for wear sensors
